title: Maika Sivo
extract:
Maika Sivo (born 3 October 1993) is a Fijian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a winger for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League and for Fiji at international level.
He has previously played for the Parramatta Eels in the NRL, Fiji 9s at international level and the NSW Residents side at representative level.
